race.comment: ANGEL CITY (7) had a bit on her rivals, scoring an impressive 2.25 lengths maiden win over 1500m at Goulburn, bet a $2.7 favourite. Boudvillain stays aboard and can use the inside gate to advantage. Lightly raced and nicely placed to double the win tally. BRANNUM (1) switched yards and surprised second-up, finding a place over 1400m at Kembla Grange. Tackles this distance for the first time, but races handy and fitter he should get every chance. CHARLIE HUSTLE (9) is third-up and on the improve. Looks suited by the rise to the mile and should be blending into it nicely from his middle draw. Right in the mix. COL DU TOURMALET (10) is a Redwood gelding that has come along nicely at the trials and is definitely worth a market watch. Keeping onside.
